assertions.expectation: Explains the difference between Rapid and Stable channels — including that Rapid has no SLA for upgrade stability while Stable carries a full SLA, and clearly distinguishes minor version vs patch version differences between the channels
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'Full SLA coverage for upgrade stability (Rapid channel has no SLA for upgrade stability)' and explains that Stable channel versions are 'more battle-tested' with different timing for patch delivery

assertions.expectation: Notes that channel changes don't trigger an immediate upgrade or downgrade
assertions.reason: Response suggests cluster 'may be auto-downgraded' in Scenario B, contradicting the expectation that channel changes don't trigger immediate version changes

assertions.expectation: Warns that if 1.30 isn't yet available on Stable, the cluster may not receive patches until Stable catches up
assertions.reason: Response discusses 1.32 availability but doesn't mention 1.30, and doesn't clearly warn about patch delivery delays if current version isn't available on Stable

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel
assertions.reason: Response provides the exact command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --region REGION --release-channel stable'

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking version availability on Stable before switching (gcloud container get-server-config)
assertions.reason: Response includes the command 'gcloud container get-server-config --region REGION --format="yaml(channels.STABLE)"' in Step 1 of the migration runbook

assertions.expectation: Discusses the impact on auto-upgrade timing going forward
assertions.reason: Response clearly discusses that 'Auto-upgrade timing shifts: Future upgrades will arrive later' and explains the new cadence and timing implications

assertions.expectation: Mentions that the Extended channel is an option if they need even slower cadence (with cost implications)
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the Extended channel at all as an option for even slower cadence

assertions.expectation: Advises coordinating the change during a maintenance window
assertions.reason: Response includes maintenance window considerations, mentions 'Plan controlled downgrade during maintenance window if needed' and discusses maintenance exclusions
